description.value: At this point your reputation on a battlefield does some of the work for you. You don't need to suppress an entire enemy force. You just need them to believe you could.

system.benefits:
Your ranged abilities gain the following enhancements:

  • Covering Fire can be maintained by spending 1 [Combat] action.
  • Threatening Sightline may now trigger twice per round instead of once
  • When a creature fails their [[/save type=will]] against Covering Fire, they also gain the Frightened condition until the start of their next turn.
  • Bleeding stacks applied through ranged attacks can only be removed from an ally's [[/check skill=medicine]] or magical healing.
